title: Template versions
description: Draft, submit, approve, publish -- and a frozen version can never change.

steps.title: The versions
steps.description: Each one is a separate, auditable package.
steps.voiceScript: Every version of the template is a separate, auditable package.
steps.captionText: Every version of the template is a separate, auditable package.
steps.fallbackMessage: The versions: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Fill it in
steps.voiceScript: The parameters here are what every site built from this version inherits.
steps.captionText: The parameters here are what every site built from this version inherits.
steps.fallbackMessage: Fill it in: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Submit for approval
steps.description: The author does not certify their own work.
steps.voiceScript: Submit it for approval. Authoring and approving are separate authorities.
steps.captionText: Submit it for approval. Authoring and approving are separate authorities.
steps.fallbackMessage: Submit for approval: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Approved, then frozen
steps.description: An approved version can never be edited again.
steps.voiceScript: Once approved and published, the version is frozen. It can never be edited again -- you raise a new version instead. That is what makes a programme built two years ago still explicable.
steps.captionText: Once approved and published, the version is frozen. It can never be edited again -- you raise a new version instead. That is what makes a programme built two years ago still explicable.
steps.fallbackMessage: Approved, then frozen: not visible on this screen yet.
